name: ANGIODYNAMICS INC
business: AngioDynamics is a dynamic, diversified medical technology company committed to expanding treatment options and improving patient outcomes and quality of life by designing, manufacturing and selling products and technologies which aid clinicians in the treatment of patients with cardiovascular disease and cancer diagnoses. The company's product offerings fall within two segments, Med Tech and Med Device.

exposures.sentence: AngioDynamics is a dynamic, diversified medical technology company committed to expanding treatment options and improving patient outcomes and quality of life by designing, manufacturing and selling products and technologies which aid clinicians in the treatment of patients with cardiovascular disease and cancer diagnoses.

The imposition of tariffs or export restrictions on products imported by us from China could require us to (i) increase prices to our customers or (ii) locate suitable alternative manufacturing capacity or relocate our operations from China to other countries.

catalysts.event: Restructuring activities expected to be completed in third quarter of fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: The restructuring activities associated with the modified Plan are still expected to be completed in the third quarter of fiscal year 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected $15.0 million in annual cost savings starting in fiscal year 2027
catalysts.sentence: The modified Plan is still expected to generate $15.0 million in annual cost savings starting in fiscal year 2027.

catalysts.event: CPT Category I Codes for IRE for prostate and liver effective January 2026
catalysts.sentence: Received CPT Category I Codes for Irreversible Electroporation (IRE), the primary method of action for the NanoKnife System, for the treatment of lesions in the prostate and liver, effective January 2026.

catalysts.event: CPT Category I Codes for IRE for pancreas effective January 2027
catalysts.sentence: Received CPT Category I Codes for Irreversible Electroporation (IRE), the primary method of action for the NanoKnife System, for the treatment of the pancreas, effective January 2027.
